scripts.dev: concurrently -n api,web -c cyan,green "npm run dev -w @splitly/api" "npm run dev -w @splitly/web"
scripts.build: npm run build -w @splitly/api && npm run build -w @splitly/web
scripts.lint: npm run lint -w @splitly/api && npm run lint -w @splitly/web
scripts.db:setup: npm run prisma:generate -w @splitly/api && npm run prisma:migrate:dev -w @splitly/api && npm run prisma:seed -w @splitly/api
scripts.db:reset: docker compose down -v && docker compose up -d
